title: Chunky Gouache
description: Ce style imite l'aspect charmant et artisanal de l'illustration éditoriale contemporaine en utilisant des textures épaisses de gouache et de pastel à la cire. Il se caractérise par des perspectives aplaties, des blocs de couleurs audacieux aux teintes très saturées, ainsi que des bords lâches au pinceau sec sans contours stricts, créant une esthétique ludique et faussement naïve.
description_en: This style emulates the charming, hand-crafted feel of contemporary editorial illustration using vibrant, chunky gouache and wax pastel textures. It features flattened perspectives, bold color-blocking with highly saturated hues, and loose, dry-brush edges that lack strict outlines, creating a playful, faux-naive aesthetic.
description_fr: Ce style imite l'aspect charmant et artisanal de l'illustration éditoriale contemporaine en utilisant des textures épaisses de gouache et de pastel à la cire. Il se caractérise par des perspectives aplaties, des blocs de couleurs audacieux aux teintes très saturées, ainsi que des bords lâches au pinceau sec sans contours stricts, créant une esthétique ludique et faussement naïve.
prompt: Hand-drawn contemporary editorial illustration utilizing chunky gouache, wax pastel, and colored pencil mixed media. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The rendering technique relies on vibrant, saturated flat color blocking with overlapping paint opacity, intentionally avoiding photorealism or smooth digital gradients. Stroke behavior is spontaneous and loose, exhibiting visible bristle marks and irregular fills where the simulated paint does not entirely cover the underlying surface. The color palette is dominated by intense {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, punctuated by bold, energetic pops of {{accent_color}}, creating a high-key, playful visual harmony. Lighting is entirely flat; there are no directional cast shadows, specular highlights, or volumetric effects. Instead, forms and spatial depth are defined purely by stark color contrasts and a flattened, faux-naive perspective that subtly skews standard geometry. The texture mimics physical art materials, featuring noticeable rough paper grain, scumbled dry brush strokes, and scratchy colored pencil marks reserved only for the finest details. Edges of objects are loose, painterly, and slightly ragged, with unrefined boundaries where distinct blocks of color meet. Strict continuous outlines are absent; contours are either implied by abrupt color shifts or drawn loosely with colored crayon. The composition ignores strict vanishing points, opting for a lively, orthographic spatial dynamic. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners., gouache illustration, dry brush, wax pastel, flat colors, contemporary editorial, faux-naive, high saturation, painterly edges, rough paper texture, color blocking, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: An abstract environmental backdrop rendered in chunky gouache and wax pastel. The scene features a flattened perspective constructed from large, irregular blocks of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, accented by spontaneous, dry-brush strokes of {{accent_color}}. The texture displays prominent rough paper grain and overlapping, semi-opaque paint layers. Lighting is completely flat with absolutely no cast shadows or specular highlights. The composition relies entirely on solid planes of highly saturated color meeting at loose, painterly, ragged edges, creating a vibrant, faux-naive atmosphere devoid of any distinct foreground subjects.
background_prompt_removebg: An abstract environmental backdrop rendered in chunky gouache and wax pastel. The scene features a flattened perspective constructed from large, irregular blocks of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, accented by spontaneous, dry-brush strokes of {{accent_color}}. The texture displays prominent rough paper grain and overlapping, semi-opaque paint layers. Lighting is completely flat with absolutely no cast shadows or specular highlights. The composition relies entirely on solid planes of highly saturated color meeting at loose, painterly, ragged edges, creating a vibrant, faux-naive atmosphere devoid of any distinct foreground subjects. Placed in front of the invisible central subject area is a decorative foreground overlay consisting of loose, scratchy colored pencil marks and scumbled dry-brush gouache borders. The entire painted environment and its hand-drawn foreground framing elements transition seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface, leaving the center open for compositing.
